response:
```json
{
  "action": "sql",
  "sql": "SELECT
  mca.yr_mth,
  mca.cust_id,
  SUM(mca.ord_cnt) AS agg_ord_cnt,
  COUNT(oh.ord_id) AS fact_ord_cnt,
  CASE WHEN SUM(mca.ord_cnt) = COUNT(oh.ord_id) THEN 'MATCH' ELSE 'MISMATCH' END AS reconciliation_status
FROM mth_cust_agg mca
LEFT JOIN ord_hdr oh
  ON mca.cust_id = oh.cust_id
  AND DATE_TRUNC('month', oh.ord_dt) = STRPTIME(mca.yr_mth || '-01', '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND oh.sts_cd <> 'X'
GROUP BY mca.yr_mth, mca.cust_id
HAVING SUM(mca.ord_cnt) <> COUNT(oh.ord_id)
ORDER BY mca.yr_mth, mca.cust_id;",
  "reason": "Compares monthly aggregate order counts to fact table counts (excluding cancelled orders) to identify reconciliation gaps."
}
```
